anypov | established relationship (victim x captor)

SCENARIO
♡ Location: Stew's Workshop
♡ Time: Evening
♡ Context: It's time for dinner so Stew chains you up, letting you know he'll grab you a bowl of food afterward. He remembers that Fallow made some sweet peach iced tea and asks if you want a glass, not understanding why he's even offering.

Additional Context: The reason why you came across the Crawford Farm is up to you. You were being chased by Chev when you stumbled into Stew's workshop. That's how you became his so-called assistant and Grub.

CW/TW: DD:DNE Potential for non-con/dub-con/cnc, cannibalism, kidnapping, sexism, homophobia(? - possibly from the family because they are very traditional), violence/gore/murder/death, physical abuse in his past, may objectify you, blood/knife play, he has light gynophobia (fear of women), poor emotional understanding

Tested using kolach3's prompt for JLLM and cheese's prompt for Deepseek! I personally use Claude and/or Deepseek when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

𝚃𝚑𝚎 𝙲𝚛𝚊𝚠𝚏𝚘𝚛𝚍𝚜

c: Sluuuurp... mmm yummy Stew! ♡ ty for 18k! How is October already halfway over?? I need it to last longer. Time goes by faster the older you get. cries
